name: @biny012/biny
description: A local-first AI agent for macOS and the terminal.
author: Biny contributors

scripts.desktop:dist: pnpm build:desktop && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.test: tsx tests/tools-scheduler.test.ts && tsx tests/tool-cancellation.test.ts && tsx tests/file-tools.test.ts && tsx tests/managed-process.test.ts && tsx tests/ai-sdk-agent.test.ts && tsx tests/tui-transcript.test.ts && tsx tests/desktop.test.ts && tsx tests/context.test.ts && tsx tests/llm-provider.test.ts && tsx tests/extensions.test.ts && tsx tests/web-search.test.ts && tsx tests/subagent-runtime.test.ts && tsx tests/root-run-scheduler.test.ts && tsx tests/root-run-ledger.test.ts && tsx tests/harness.test.ts && tsx tests/task-contract.test.ts && tsx tests/task-run-store.test.ts && tsx tests/task-contract-factory.test.ts && tsx tests/acceptance-verifier.test.ts && tsx tests/task-runtime.test.ts && tsx tests/cli-sigint.test.ts
